meta.title: Yi-Li Chiu | Superconducting Quantum Circuits CV
meta.description: Academic CV for Yi-Li Chiu, focused on superconducting quantum circuits, high-frequency electromagnetic simulation, automated scientific pipelines, and research infrastructure.

hero.headline: Physics researcher building automated simulation pipelines for superconducting quantum circuits.
hero.role: Superconducting Quantum Circuits · FEM Simulation · Scientific Automation
hero.summary: B.S. candidate in Physics at National Central University, combining admittance-based qubit modeling, layout-to-FEM workflows, and research infrastructure for fast, reproducible iteration.

summary: Physics B.S. candidate at National Central University focused on superconducting quantum circuits and high-frequency electromagnetic simulation.
Experienced in building automated scientific data pipelines that connect layout design, finite-element analysis (FEM), and large-scale parameter sweeps.
Hands-on with computational resource management, Linux/Docker infrastructure, and storage systems, with a focus on bringing engineering discipline into physics research workflows.

items: High-frequency electromagnetic simulation with ANSYS HFSS and Palace
Python with NumPy, SciPy, and Matplotlib
Synology NAS, TrueNAS, and HPC cluster resource usage

projects.title: Undergraduate Thesis: XY-Line External Coupling Effects on Floating Qubit Energy Relaxation

bullets.label: Theoretical Framework
bullets.text: Applied an admittance-based formulation to model floating qubits and define internal and external coupling paths, providing a clear physical basis for energy-relaxation analysis.

bullets.label: Theory-Simulation Cross-Validation
bullets.text: Cross-validated quasi-static extraction and full-wave finite element analysis to verify model consistency under different assumptions and reduce systematic numerical error.

bullets.label: Layout-FEM Workflow Automation
bullets.text: Developed an automated workflow from GDSII layout to FEM simulation and connected it to parametric design tooling for faster iteration.

bullets.label: Circuit Parameter Sweep & Analysis
bullets.text: Built a mapping from lumped circuit models to Hamiltonian systems centered on Coupling Strength and ZZ Interaction Strength Space, enabling multi-dimensional scans that identify and calibrate critical circuit parameters.

bullets.label: Large-Scale Compute Allocation
bullets.text: Used National Center for High-performance Computing (NCHC) cluster resources to run large-scale parallel computation for complex layout FEM models.

bullets.label: Mesh Refinement Optimization
bullets.text: Systematically tuned mesh refinement parameters to balance runtime and numerical accuracy for reliable high-frequency electromagnetic simulation.

bullets.label: Laboratory Data Environment
bullets.text: Helped maintain a lab-scale Synology NAS storage system, improving backup strategy, team collaboration, and research-file access reliability.

bullets.label: Personal Research Infrastructure
bullets.text: Built and maintained a customized TrueNAS system integrated with Docker to support research-data management, automated backups, and flexible compute-environment scheduling.

details: Thesis: Study of XY-Line External Coupling Effects on Floating Qubit Energy Relaxation

meta.title: 邱羿理 | 超導量子電路履歷
meta.description: 邱羿理的學術履歷，聚焦超導量子電路、高頻電磁模擬、自動化科學管線與研究基礎設施。

hero.headline: 以自動化模擬管線推進超導量子電路研究的物理研究者。
hero.role: 超導量子電路 · FEM 模擬 · 科學自動化
hero.summary: 國立中央大學物理系學士候選人，結合 admittance-based 量子位元建模、Layout-to-FEM 工作流與研究基礎設施，讓物理研究流程更快速、可重現且易於迭代。

summary: 國立中央大學物理系學士候選人，專注於超導量子電路與高頻電磁模擬。
擅長建立科學研究的自動化管線，整合 Layout 設計、有限元素分析（FEM）及大規模參數掃描。
具備高效率計算資源管理與系統建構實務經驗，致力於將工程思維導入物理研究流程。

items: 高頻電磁模擬（ANSYS HFSS, Palace）
多維參數空間掃描與分析
Synology NAS、TrueNAS 與 HPC 叢集資源應用

projects.title: 學士論文：XY-Line 外耦合對浮動量子位元之能量弛豫研究

bullets.label: 理論架構建構
bullets.text: 應用 admittance-based formulation 建立浮動量子位元模型，並定義內部與外部耦合路徑，為系統能量弛豫提供明確的物理分析基礎。

bullets.label: 理論與模擬跨驗證
bullets.text: 透過交叉驗證準靜態萃取（Quasi-static extraction）與全波有限元素分析（Full-wave FEM），確保量子位元在不同模型假設下的一致性，有效降低數值模擬之系統性誤差。

projects.title: 自動化模擬管線開發
projects.meta: Layout、FEM 與電路參數工作流

bullets.label: Layout-FEM 流程自動化
bullets.text: 開發從 GDSII 佈局到 FEM 模擬的自動化工作流，並成功串接參數化設計工具，實現模擬流程的快速迭代。

bullets.label: 自動化電路參數掃描與分析
bullets.text: 以 Coupling Strength 與 ZZ Interaction Strength Space 為核心，建立從集總元件電路模型至 Hamiltonian 系統的映射機制；透過多維參數空間掃描，快速鎖定關鍵電路參數並進行精準校準。

projects.title: 高效能計算與資源優化

bullets.label: 大規模運算配置
bullets.text: 運用國家高速網路與計算中心（NCHC）叢集資源，針對複雜 Layout FEM 模型進行大規模並行計算。

bullets.label: 網格劃分優化
bullets.text: 系統性優化網格劃分（Mesh Refinement）參數，在運算時間與數值精度間取得平衡，確保高階電磁模擬之可靠性。

bullets.label: 實驗室數據環境協作
bullets.text: 協助維護實驗室級 Synology NAS 儲存系統，優化數據備份策略與團隊協作環境，確保研究檔案之存取效率與安全性。

bullets.label: 個人科研基礎建設
bullets.text: 建構並維護高度客製化之 TrueNAS 儲存系統，整合 Docker 容器化技術，實現個人科研數據之高效管理、自動化備份與靈活的運算環境調度。

education.school: 國立中央大學（National Central University）
